title: equisetum fluviatile var. verticillatum
intro: Equisetum fluviatile var. verticillatum, also known as water horsetail, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Equisetaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, derived from its high silica content and other compounds. The health benefits of water horsetail include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney problems, as well as helping to reduce blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Water horsetail can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, or as a topical application for skin and wound care, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
